description: Root install instructions pipe a remote script directly into bash with no local review step; install.sh is hosted off-repo and unauditable from source control.
suggested_fix: Promote the agent-mediated review-first install path (already documented in aihot/README.md) to the primary/only documented method, or vendor install.sh into this repo so changes are diffable.

description: English mirror of the same curl-pipe-to-shell install command.
suggested_fix: Same as README.md finding: promote review-first install path or vendor install.sh.

description: Process substitution is functionally equivalent to curl | bash; mitigated somewhat by preceding 'review the script first' guidance in the same doc.
suggested_fix: Document a two-step download-then-inspect-then-run alternative alongside this one-liner.

description: title, meta_line, and author are f-string-interpolated into the cover-page HTML with no html.escape(); meta_line derives from researched Markdown that can carry web-sourced content.
suggested_fix: Wrap title/author/meta_line with html.escape() before interpolating into cover_html.

description: Install command for weasyprint/markdown has no version pins (also repeated at line 212), so a breaking upstream release silently changes report output.
suggested_fix: Pin to tested version ranges, e.g. pip install "weasyprint>=62,<63" "markdown>=3.7,<4" --break-system-packages.

description: const DATA = __REPORT_DATA__ embeds json.dumps() output raw inside a <script> tag without escaping </script> sequences; exploitation requires a local attacker who can already name a file on the scanned disk.
suggested_fix: Escape '<' as \u003c in the JSON blob before substituting it into the template (e.g. json.dumps(data).replace('<', '\\u003c')).

description: Description is approximately 515 characters, in the R04 500-800 char band.
suggested_fix: Trim the description toward the audience-facing trigger phrases and drop redundant restatement.

description: Body is approximately 409 lines, in the R05 400-500 line band.
suggested_fix: Move the more example-heavy sections (recommended phrase lists, structure templates) into references/ to bring the body under 400 lines.

description: Description is approximately 800 characters, at or near the R04 800-char threshold; exact count is sensitive to YAML fold whitespace handling and could not be verified with a code interpreter in this run.
suggested_fix: Trim a clause or two from the negative-trigger list to leave clear headroom under 800 chars.
